description: Tracked layout contract for ignored user-supplied local assets under local-lab/rebuild-godot. Payloads must never be committed.
notes: Smoke mode always keeps procedural synthetics so goldens and color anchors stay valid.
FBX from AYA export must be converted to self-contained GLB or bounded OBJ before manifest activation.
Bootstrap stores both verified roles under one content-addressed version and publishes manifest.json last.
Core movement remains the deterministic InteractiveSession adapter; presentation follows snapshots only.
